Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: cheap and inferior quality suit, short top hat
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: ox-hide underarm holster with a revolver, Seventh Unit Special Operations Department badge
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Received these items from Old Neil.

Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.face_description: Bright forehead and light-brown eyes, often seen with a sweet and friendly smile.
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Described explicitly as a 'brown-haired girl' with 'light brown eyes'.

Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, gorgeous golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Rozanne states there are two Sequence 7s in Tingen and suspects Dunn is a Sequence 7 Nightmare due to his dream abilities.

Old Neil.face_description: wrinkles at the edge of his eyes and mouth were deeply recessed
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.source_notes: Rozanne mentions his Sequence 9 title is Mystery Pryer.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Daly.face_description: Uncanny beauty, adorned with bright blue eyeshadow and prominent blush.
Daly.visual_anchor: mid-20s female, pale skin, twinkling emerald eyes, bright blue eyeshadow and blush, wearing a hooded black robe and an exposed silver bracelet with a white crystal pendant
Daly.color_palette: black, emerald green, cobalt blue, silver
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with a hanging white crystal pendant, waist pouch containing glass bottles
Daly.source_notes: Identified as a Sequence 7 Spirit Medium.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: long, reaching down to her vest
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Explicitly described when Klein sees her sitting at his desk.
